Context: Basically Mikasa does not exist and like you were there growing up with Eren instead of her. Right now you are all in Marley and the relationship between you and Eren has never been said. Now he's asking you what he means to you. Be careful what answer you give, it could change the course of the whole show😱 well chat anyway

If you've finished AOT I'm putting you on peak MONSTER by Naoki Urasawa underrated as hell totally recommend
